outcome: Psychosocial interventions versus inactive control; outcome 1: PTSD symptoms, post-treatment
source_quote: This paper (Walsh et al. 2017, Alcohol Clin Exp Res) examines the effect of a video-based intervention (PPRS) on alcohol and marijuana use among sexual assault victims. PTSD symptoms are not measured or reported as an outcome in this study.

outcome: Psychosocial interventions versus inactive control; outcome 1: PTSD symptoms, post-treatment

raw_data.note: PCL-5 Total Symptom Severity at 3-month follow-up (post individual sessions). ImpACT=intervention, SoC=control. Values are Mean (SE) from mixed model. Per-arm n at 3-month assessment not specified (total n=45 at 3-month). Baseline n: ImpACT=32, SoC=32. Time x condition interaction F(1,43)=3.15, p=.08 (trend).

source_quote: PCL Total Symptom Severity Score: ImpACT 25.79 (5.40), SoC 23.04 (3.60) at 3-Month Follow-up (n=45). Baseline to 3-Month: Time F=15.84**, Condition*Time F=3.15 (p=.08 trend). Baseline: ImpACT 43.28 (3.88), SoC 30.72 (3.58).

raw_data.note: PCL-5 Total Symptom Severity at 6-month follow-up. ImpACT=intervention, SoC=control. Values are Mean (SE) from mixed model. Per-arm n at 6-month not specified (total n=51 at 6-month). Baseline n: ImpACT=32, SoC=32. Time x condition interaction F(2,93)=0.90, p=NS.

source_quote: PCL Total Symptom Severity Score: ImpACT 28.61 (5.04), SoC 22.50 (3.47) at 6-Month Follow-up (n=51). Baseline to 6-Month: Time F=7.54**, Condition*Time F=0.90 (NS). Baseline: ImpACT 43.28 (3.88), SoC 30.72 (3.58).

outcome: Trauma-focused versus non trauma-focused interventions; outcome 1: PTSD symptoms, post-treatment
source_quote: Table 3: PCL-5 Post-treatment: EMDR n=22, M=32.10, SD=16.89; TAU n=20, M=37.95, SD=11.26. Between-group effect size at post-treatment d=0.41. Mixed model condition effect estimate=-4.92 (SE=3.63), 95% CI [-12.27, 2.43], not significant.

outcome: Trauma-focused versus non trauma-focused interventions; outcome 1: PTSD symptoms, 3 months
source_quote: Table 3: PCL-5 at 12 weeks (3 months post-rape): EMDR n=20, M=22.09, SD=16.41; TAU n=17, M=23.29, SD=17.94. Between-group effect size at 12 weeks d=0.07. No significant condition or condition-time interaction effects.

outcome: Trauma-focused versus non trauma-focused interventions; outcome 2: Depressive symptoms, post-treatment
source_quote: Table 3: HADS Depression Post-treatment: EMDR n=21, M=8.48, SD=4.06; TAU n=20, M=8.95, SD=3.76. Between-group effect size at post-treatment d=0.12. Mixed model condition effect estimate=-1.63 (SE=1.07), 95% CI [-3.80, 0.54], not significant.
